Julian's Blog

!This website is a work in progress!

I was made known of a website called Low Tech Webring Directory. A website filled with interconnected web 1.0 styled websites made by individuals from around the world. I dont know what but this gave me an insane nostalgia rush from my early days on the internet, and as of May 30, 2024 8:15 CST I've spent the past three hours hyperfixted on this.

I will be trying to work on this small little personal website project over the summer of 2024. Is it wise to focus on this niche hobby rather than working on ones professional side projects/career? Probably not, but hey I can think of it as motivation.
